# Zuzia

> Server and website monitoring resource: uptime, SSL, task automation, AI alerts.

## Guides

- [Advanced Linux Performance Monitoring Techniques](https://zuzia.app/learn/advanced-linux-performance-monitoring-techniques): Discover advanced Linux performance monitoring techniques, including custom scripts and tools for in-depth metrics analysis. Learn practical methods to monitor system performance effectively.
- [Automated Server Monitoring Setup Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/automated-server-monitoring-setup): Step-by-step guide to set up your first server in Zuzia.app. Install the agent, configure host metrics, set up your first alert, and verify everything works.
- [Complete Server Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/complete-guide-server-monitoring-linux): Comprehensive checklist of everything to monitor on Linux servers. From CPU and memory to security and application health - ensure complete coverage.
- [Comprehensive Linux Server Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/comprehensive-linux-server-monitoring): Scale monitoring across multiple servers. Organize by environment, set up aggregated views, create escalation policies, and manage alert fatigue.
- [Creating Health Check Scripts for Linux Systems - Step-by-Step Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/creating-health-check-scripts-linux): Learn to create effective health check scripts for Linux systems, ensuring optimal performance and reliability with essential metrics and alerts.
- [Top Free Tools for Effective Server Uptime Monitoring - Comprehensive Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/free-tools-server-uptime-monitoring): Discover the best free tools for server uptime monitoring, their features, and how to choose the right one for your needs.
- [Monitor Server Performance Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/how-to-monitor-server-performance-linux): Monitor Linux server performance metrics effectively. Track resource usage, detect bottlenecks, optimize performance. Setup automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Linux Command Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/linux-command-monitoring-scheduled-tasks): Monitor Linux servers using scheduled commands. Execute custom monitoring tasks automatically, track command outputs, detect issues. Setup with Zuzia.app.
- [Linux Monitoring Tools Comparative Analysis - Features, Performance, and User Experiences](https://zuzia.app/learn/linux-monitoring-tools-comparative-analysis): Discover the best Linux monitoring tools with our detailed comparison of features, performance, and user experiences to help you make an informed choice.
- [Linux Performance Testing Best Practices - Methodologies and Tools](https://zuzia.app/learn/linux-performance-testing-best-practices): Discover essential best practices for Linux performance testing, including methodologies and tools to achieve accurate results. Learn how to conduct effective performance tests and interpret results.
- [Linux Performance Tools Comparison - Features, Use Cases, and Metrics](https://zuzia.app/learn/linux-performance-tools-comparison): Explore the best Linux performance tools in our detailed comparison. Discover features, use cases, and metrics to optimize your server performance.
- [Linux Performance Tuning Strategies - Best Practices for System Administrators](https://zuzia.app/learn/linux-performance-tuning-strategies): Discover proven strategies for tuning Linux performance effectively. Optimize your system configurations for maximum efficiency and speed with practical, actionable techniques.
- [Linux Resource Monitoring Best Practices - Tools and Techniques](https://zuzia.app/learn/linux-resource-monitoring-best-practices): Discover best practices and tools for effective Linux resource monitoring to optimize CPU, memory, and disk usage with practical tips and lesser-known tools.
- [Linux Server Monitoring Best Practices](https://zuzia.app/learn/linux-server-monitoring-best-practices): Common monitoring mistakes that lead to alert fatigue and missed incidents. Learn what NOT to do and how to fix broken monitoring setups.
- [Setting Up Linux Uptime Monitoring - Step-by-Step Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/linux-uptime-monitoring-setup): Learn how to set up effective uptime monitoring for Linux servers with our step-by-step guide, featuring essential tools and automation scripts.
- [Complete Guide to API Endpoint Monitoring - Uptime and Performance](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-api-endpoints-uptime-performance): Comprehensive guide to monitoring API endpoints for uptime and performance. Learn how to track API availability, response times, error rates, and ensure reliable API service delivery.
- [Application Deployment and Releases Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-application-deployment-releases): Comprehensive guide to monitoring application deployments and releases on Linux servers. Learn how to track deployment status, monitor release health, detect deployment failures, and set up automated deployment monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Application Performance Monitoring on Linux](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-application-performance-linux): Comprehensive guide to monitoring application performance on Linux servers. Learn how to track application metrics, identify bottlenecks, and optimize application performance with automated monitoring.
- [Complete Guide to Automated Backup Monitoring and Verification](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-backup-verification-automated): Comprehensive guide to automated backup monitoring and verification. Learn how to monitor backup success, verify backup integrity, and ensure reliable data protection with automated tools.
- [Complete Guide to Cache Performance Monitoring - Redis and Memcached](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-cache-performance-redis-memcached): Comprehensive guide to monitoring cache performance for Redis and Memcached. Learn how to track cache hit ratios, monitor cache memory usage, and optimize cache performance.
- [Complete Guide to Cloud Resources Monitoring (AWS, Azure, GCP)](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-cloud-resources-aws-azure-gcp): Comprehensive guide to monitoring cloud resources across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Learn how to track resource usage, monitor costs, detect issues, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Compliance and Audit Requirements Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-compliance-audit-requirements): Comprehensive guide to monitoring compliance and audit requirements on Linux servers. Learn how to track compliance status, verify audit requirements, detect compliance violations, and set up automated compliance monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Kubernetes and Container Orchestration Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-container-orchestration-kubernetes): Comprehensive guide to monitoring Kubernetes clusters and container orchestration. Learn how to track pod status, monitor cluster resources, and ensure reliable containerized applications.
- [Essential Guide to Monitoring CPU Usage](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-cpu): Understand what CPU metrics actually mean. Learn user vs system time, I/O wait, steal time, and how to interpret these for troubleshooting and optimization.
- [Cron Jobs and Scheduled Tasks Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-cron-jobs-scheduled-tasks): Comprehensive guide to monitoring cron jobs and scheduled tasks on Linux servers. Learn how to track cron job execution, monitor job failures, detect missed executions, and set up automated cron monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Data Retention Lifecycle Policies Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-data-retention-lifecycle-policies): Comprehensive guide to monitoring data retention and lifecycle policies on Linux servers. Learn how to track data retention compliance, monitor policy enforcement, detect violations, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Database Performance Monitoring Guide - MySQL and PostgreSQL](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-database-performance-mysql-postgresql): Comprehensive guide to monitoring MySQL and PostgreSQL database performance. Learn how to track query performance, connection pools, slow queries, and optimize database operations with automated monitoring.
- [Disaster Recovery Readiness Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-disaster-recovery-readiness): Comprehensive guide to monitoring disaster recovery readiness on Linux servers. Learn how to track backup status, verify recovery procedures, test disaster recovery, and set up automated DR monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Disk Health Monitoring with SMART - Predictive Maintenance Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-disk-health-smart-predictive): Comprehensive guide to monitoring disk health using SMART attributes for predictive maintenance. Learn how to track disk failures, monitor disk wear, and prevent data loss.
- [Complete Guide to Disk Space Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-disk): Understand disk metrics beyond just "percent full". Learn about IOPS, I/O wait, inode usage, filesystem types, and how they impact your server's performance.
- [Complete Guide to DNS Performance and Resolution Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-dns-performance-resolution): Comprehensive guide to monitoring DNS performance and resolution. Learn how to track DNS query times, detect DNS failures, and ensure reliable domain name resolution with automated monitoring.
- [Complete Guide to Docker Container Monitoring in Production](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-docker-containers-production): Comprehensive guide to monitoring Docker containers in production environments. Learn how to track container resources, health, logs, and performance with automated monitoring tools.
- [How to Monitor Domain and URL Availability](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-domains): Understand different types of domain monitoring. Learn when to use HTTP checks, ping, DNS monitoring, and how they complement each other.
- [Complete Guide to Email Delivery and SMTP Reliability Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-email-delivery-smtp-reliability): Comprehensive guide to monitoring email delivery and SMTP reliability. Learn how to track email queue status, monitor SMTP server performance, and ensure reliable email delivery.
- [Complete Guide to File Integrity Monitoring for Security Audits](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-file-integrity-security-audit): Comprehensive guide to file integrity monitoring for security audits. Learn how to detect unauthorized file changes, monitor critical system files, and maintain security compliance.
- [Complete Guide to Filesystem Health Monitoring (ext4, XFS, Btrfs)](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-filesystem-health-ext4-xfs-btrfs): Comprehensive guide to monitoring filesystem health on Linux servers. Learn how to track filesystem integrity, detect corruption, monitor performance, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Incident Response Procedures Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-incident-response-procedures): Comprehensive guide to monitoring incident response procedures and effectiveness on Linux servers. Learn how to track incident metrics, monitor response times, measure effectiveness, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Infrastructure as Code Monitoring (Terraform)](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-infrastructure-as-code-terraform): Comprehensive guide to monitoring infrastructure as code with Terraform. Learn how to track IaC changes, detect drift, monitor deployments, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Monitoring Linux System Performance - Tools and Techniques](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-linux-system-performance-tools-techniques): Discover essential tools and techniques for monitoring Linux system performance effectively. Optimize your server's efficiency with practical monitoring solutions.
- [Load Balancer Health Monitoring Guide - Backend Management](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-load-balancer-health-backend): Comprehensive guide to monitoring load balancer health and backend servers. Learn how to track backend server status, monitor health checks, and ensure reliable load balancing.
- [Complete Guide to Centralized Log File Monitoring and Analysis](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-log-files-centralized-analysis): Comprehensive guide to centralized log file monitoring and analysis. Learn how to collect, aggregate, and analyze logs from multiple servers for effective troubleshooting and security monitoring.
- [Complete Guide to LVM Logical Volumes Storage Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-lvm-logical-volumes-storage): Comprehensive guide to monitoring LVM logical volumes and storage on Linux servers. Learn how to track LVM health, monitor volume groups, detect issues, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Metrics Aggregation and Alerting Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-metrics-aggregation-alerting): Comprehensive guide to monitoring metrics aggregation and alerting systems on Linux servers. Learn how to track metric collection, monitor alert delivery, detect alerting failures, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Microservices Architecture Health Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-microservices-architecture-health): Comprehensive guide to monitoring microservices architecture health on Linux servers. Learn how to track service health, monitor inter-service communication, detect failures, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Multi-Server Infrastructure Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-multi-server-infrastructure): Comprehensive guide to monitoring multi-server infrastructure on Linux. Learn how to track multiple servers, monitor infrastructure health, detect cross-server issues, and set up automated multi-server monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Network Bandwidth Monitoring on Linux Servers](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-network-bandwidth-linux): Comprehensive guide to monitoring network bandwidth on Linux servers. Learn how to track network usage, identify bottlenecks, optimize performance, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Network Firewall Rules and iptables Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-network-firewall-rules-iptables): Comprehensive guide to monitoring network firewall rules and iptables on Linux servers. Learn how to track firewall rule changes, monitor rule effectiveness, detect unauthorized changes, and set up automated firewall monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Network Routing and Connectivity Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-network-routing-connectivity): Comprehensive guide to monitoring network routing and connectivity on Linux servers. Learn how to track routing tables, monitor network connectivity, detect routing issues, and set up automated routing monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Network Segmentation Access Control Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-network-segmentation-access-control): Comprehensive guide to monitoring network segmentation and access control on Linux servers. Learn how to track network ACLs, verify segmentation rules, detect misconfigurations, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Server Ping Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-ping): Master the basics of ping monitoring for Linux servers. Learn how ICMP works, interpret latency metrics, troubleshoot packet loss, and diagnose connectivity issues effectively.
- [Complete Guide to RAID Arrays Health and Status Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-raid-arrays-health-status): Comprehensive guide to monitoring RAID array health and status on Linux servers. Learn how to track RAID degradation, detect failures, monitor performance, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to RAM Memory Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-ram): Demystify Linux memory metrics. Learn what buffers, cache, used, free, and available actually mean, and why your server isn't really out of memory.
- [Complete Guide to Root Cause Analysis Troubleshooting Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-root-cause-analysis-troubleshooting): Comprehensive guide to monitoring root cause analysis and troubleshooting processes on Linux servers. Learn how to track troubleshooting effectiveness, monitor analysis tools, detect analysis failures, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Server Configuration Drift Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-server-configuration-drift): Comprehensive guide to monitoring server configuration drift on Linux servers. Learn how to track configuration changes, detect unauthorized modifications, prevent configuration drift, and set up automated configuration monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Server Security Events Monitoring and Intrusion Detection](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-server-security-events-intrusion-detection): Comprehensive guide to monitoring server security events and detecting intrusions on Linux servers. Learn how to track authentication failures, detect suspicious activity, monitor file integrity, and set up automated security monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Complete Guide to Service Mesh Monitoring (Istio, Linkerd)](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-service-mesh-istio-linkerd): Comprehensive guide to monitoring service mesh infrastructure with Istio and Linkerd. Learn how to track mesh health, monitor traffic, detect failures, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [SSL/TLS Certificate Deep Dive - Technical Diagnostics and Security](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-ssl): Master the technical aspects of SSL/TLS certificates. Learn certificate chain validation, diagnose configuration issues, troubleshoot common problems, and implement security best practices beyond basic expiration monitoring.
- [System Kernel Module Health Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-system-kernel-module-health): Comprehensive guide to monitoring system kernel module health on Linux servers. Learn how to track kernel modules, monitor module loading, detect module failures, and set up automated kernel module monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [System Performance Baselines Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-system-performance-baselines): Comprehensive guide to monitoring system performance baselines on Linux servers. Learn how to establish baselines, track performance trends, detect performance deviations, and set up automated baseline monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [System Resource Limits and Quotas Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-system-resource-limits-quotas): Comprehensive guide to monitoring system resource limits and quotas on Linux servers. Learn how to track resource usage, monitor quota limits, detect quota exhaustion, and set up automated quota monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [System Updates and Package Management Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-system-updates-package-management): Comprehensive guide to monitoring system updates and package management on Linux servers. Learn how to track available updates, monitor update installations, detect update failures, and set up automated update monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Systemd Services and Dependencies Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/monitoring-systemd-services-dependencies): Comprehensive guide to monitoring systemd services and their dependencies on Linux servers. Learn how to track service status, monitor dependencies, detect service failures, and set up automated service monitoring with Zuzia.app.

Learn how to track vulnerability scans, monitor security findings, detect new vulnerabilities, and set up automated monitoring with Zuzia.app.

- [Server CPU Monitoring - Automated Tracking](https://zuzia.app/learn/server-cpu-monitoring): Build a comprehensive CPU monitoring strategy. Configure thresholds, set up alerts, track trends over time, and make data-driven capacity decisions.

- [Best Practices for Server Performance Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/server-performance-monitoring-best-practices): Discover best practices for server performance monitoring, including key metrics, tools, and strategies to optimize your server's efficiency and reliability.
- [Server Performance Optimization Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/server-performance-optimization-guide): Optimize server performance effectively. Identify bottlenecks, improve efficiency, optimize resource usage. Setup monitoring.
- [Server Ping Monitoring with Global Agents](https://zuzia.app/learn/server-ping-monitoring-global-agents): Monitor server ping from Poland, New York, and Singapore simultaneously. Detect regional outages before users report them, compare latency across continents.
- [Server RAM Monitoring - Automated Metrics](https://zuzia.app/learn/server-ram-memory-monitoring): Setup automated RAM monitoring with Zuzia.app. Track memory usage continuously, detect memory leaks, receive alerts before exhaustion.
- [Server Resource Monitoring - Complete Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/server-resource-monitoring-complete-guide): Monitor server resources comprehensively: CPU, memory, disk, network. Track usage trends, identify bottlenecks, optimize allocation.
- [Server Security Audit Complete Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/server-security-audit-complete-guide): Perform comprehensive security audits on Linux servers. Identify vulnerabilities, detect misconfigurations, maintain security compliance.
- [SSL Certificate Expiration Monitoring Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/ssl-certificate-expiration-monitoring): Monitor SSL certificate expiration effectively. Track certificate validity, receive alerts before expiration, automate renewal reminders.
- [SSL Certificate Monitoring Strategy](https://zuzia.app/learn/ssl-certificate-monitoring-expiration): Build a bulletproof SSL monitoring strategy. Track expiration across all domains, set up tiered alerts, automate renewal workflows, maintain certificate inventory.
- [Understanding Server Health Checks](https://zuzia.app/learn/understanding-server-health-checks): Discover the significance of server health checks, key metrics to monitor, and how they enhance uptime and performance. Learn practical steps for effective implementation.
- [Understanding Server Performance Metrics - Essential Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/understanding-server-performance-metrics): Explore essential server performance metrics to monitor for optimal health, including CPU, memory, and disk I/O, ensuring your server runs smoothly.
- [The Role of Uptime Monitoring in Business Continuity](https://zuzia.app/learn/uptime-monitoring-business-continuity): Discover how uptime monitoring safeguards business continuity with strategies, case studies, and implementation tips.
- [Monitor Website Uptime Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/website-uptime-monitoring-guide): Monitor website uptime effectively. Track availability from multiple global locations, detect downtime quickly, ensure 24/7 website availability.
- [Monitor Website URL with Global Agents](https://zuzia.app/learn/website-url-monitoring-global-agents): Monitor your website from Europe, Americas, and Asia simultaneously. Detect when your site is down in one region but up in others.

## Articles

- [API Endpoint Slow Response Times - Troubleshooting Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/api-endpoint-slow-response-times): Troubleshooting guide for API endpoints with slow response times. Learn how to diagnose performance issues, identify bottlenecks, and optimize API response times.
- [API Integration with Zuzia.app](https://zuzia.app/learn/api-integration): Integrate Zuzia.app with your applications using REST API. Access monitoring data, configure checks programmatically, retrieve metrics, and automate monitoring workflows.
- [Application Deployment Failures - Troubleshooting Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/application-deployment-failures): Application deployment failures preventing releases? Quick steps to identify deployment issues, fix deployment problems, and restore application functionality.
- [Backup Failed or Corrupted Restore - Troubleshooting Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/backup-failed-corrupted-restore): Troubleshooting guide for backup failures and corrupted restore issues. Learn how to diagnose backup problems, verify backup integrity, and fix restore failures.
- [Cache Miss Rate High Performance Impact - Troubleshooting Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/cache-miss-rate-high-performance): Troubleshooting guide for high cache miss rates impacting performance. Learn how to diagnose cache issues, identify root causes, and optimize cache hit rates.
- [Check Active SSH Connections](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-active-ssh-connections-linux): Set up continuous monitoring to check active SSH connections on your Linux server. Monitor remote access and detect unauthorized connections automatically.
- [Check All System Services Status](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-all-system-services-status): Check status of all system services on Linux servers. Monitor systemd services, detect failed services, ensure critical services are running. Setup with Zuzia.app.
- [Check Apache Virtual Hosts Configuration](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-apache-virtual-hosts-config): Configure automated checks to check Apache virtual hosts configuration on your Linux server. Monitor web server setup and detect configuration changes automatically.
- [Check API Endpoint Response Status](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-api-endpoint-response-status): Step-by-step guide to check API endpoint response status. Monitor API availability, track HTTP status codes, and ensure reliable API service delivery.
- [Check Backup Files Integrity](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-backup-files-integrity): Step-by-step guide to check backup files integrity. Verify backup completeness, test restore procedures, and ensure reliable data protection.
- [How to Check Capacity Planning Metrics on Linux](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-capacity-planning-metrics): Check capacity planning metrics on Linux servers. Monitor resource usage trends, track growth patterns, predict capacity needs. Setup monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [How to Check Configuration File Changes](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-configuration-file-changes): Check configuration file changes on Linux servers. Monitor config file modifications, detect unauthorized changes, track configuration history, and set up automated config monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [How to Check Container Registry Health on Linux](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-container-registry-health): Check container registry health on Linux servers. Monitor registry availability, verify image access, detect registry failures. Setup monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [How to Check Cron Job Execution History](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-cron-job-execution-history): Check cron job execution history on Linux servers. Monitor cron job execution, track execution logs, detect failed executions, and set up automated cron history monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [How to Check Data Archiving Status on Linux](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-data-archiving-status): Check data archiving status on Linux servers. Monitor archive completion, verify archive integrity, detect archiving failures. Setup monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [How to Check Data Retention Compliance on Linux](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-data-retention-compliance): Check data retention compliance on Linux servers. Monitor retention policies, verify deletion compliance, detect violations. Setup monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Check Detailed System Information with lshw](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-detailed-system-information-lshw): Configure automated checks to check detailed hardware information on your Linux server. Monitor system configuration and detect hardware changes automatically.
- [How to Check Disaster Recovery Backup Status](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-disaster-recovery-backup-status): Check disaster recovery backup status on Linux servers. Monitor backup completion, verify backup integrity, track backup freshness, and set up automated backup monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Check Disk Read and Write Performance](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-disk-read-write-performance): Configure automated checks to monitor disk read and write performance on your Linux server to detect I/O bottlenecks and optimize storage performance.
- [Check Disk SMART Attributes for Health](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-disk-smart-attributes-health): Step-by-step guide to check disk SMART attributes for health. Monitor disk wear, detect disk failures early, and prevent data loss with predictive maintenance.
- [Check Disk SMART Health Status](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-disk-smart-health-status): Check disk SMART health status on Linux servers. Monitor disk hardware health, predict failures, detect disk issues early. Setup SMART monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Check Disk Space on All Filesystems](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-disk-space-mounted-filesystems): Check disk space usage on all mounted filesystems on your Linux server to monitor storage across all partitions and prevent disk space issues.
- [Docker Security Configuration Audit Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-docker-security-configuration-audit): Audit Docker security configuration. Verify container security, prevent container escape, ensure proper hardening. Setup automated security audits with Zuzia.app.
- [Check Empty Password Accounts in Audit](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-empty-password-accounts-security): Automated solution to identify user accounts with empty or disabled passwords. Detect accounts that can be accessed without authentication, posing security risks.
- [How to Check Encryption Status Compliance on Linux](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-encryption-status-compliance): Check encryption status compliance on Linux servers. Monitor encryption configuration, verify encryption enforcement, detect compliance violations. Setup monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Check Fail2Ban Security Configuration](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-fail2ban-security-configuration-audit): Check Fail2Ban security configuration in security audit. Verify Fail2Ban is properly configured, detect brute-force protection issues, ensure SSH security. Audit guide.
- [Check File Sizes in Current Directory](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-file-sizes-current-directory): Quick guide to check file sizes in the current directory on your Linux server. Identify large files consuming disk space before your server runs out of storage.
- [How to Check Filesystem Health (ext4, XFS) on Linux](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-filesystem-health-ext4-xfs): Check filesystem health for ext4 and XFS filesystems on Linux servers. Monitor filesystem integrity, detect corruption, verify mount status. Setup monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Check Firewall Configuration in Audit](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-firewall-configuration-security-audit): Check firewall configuration in security audit. Verify iptables, UFW, or firewalld rules, detect misconfigurations, ensure proper network security. Security audit guide.
- [How to Check Firewall Rules Changes](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-firewall-rules-changes): Check firewall rules changes on Linux servers. Monitor iptables rule modifications, detect unauthorized changes, track rule history, and set up automated firewall change monitoring with Zuzia.app.
- [Check Kernel Messages with dmesg](https://zuzia.app/learn/check-kernel-messages-dmesg-linux): Automated solution to check kernel messages on your Linux server. Monitor system events, hardware issues, and driver problems automatically.

- [Uptime Server Monitoring Linux: A Practitioner’s Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/uptime-server-monitoring-linux): Practical uptime server monitoring linux guide for Linux teams: checks, alerting, false positives, configuration choices, and rollout best practices.
- [Uptime Server Monitoring Software: A Practitioner's Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/uptime-server-monitoring-software): A practitioner-grade guide to uptime server monitoring software: what it is, how it works, what to evaluate, and how to avoid false positives.
- [Uptime Server Monitoring Ubuntu: A Practical Operator’s Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/uptime-server-monitoring-ubuntu): A practitioner-grade guide to uptime server monitoring ubuntu, covering checks, alerts, false positives, configuration choices, and production best practices.
- [Uptime Server Monitoring Upgrade: A Practitioner’s Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/uptime-server-monitoring-upgrade): A practical guide to uptime server monitoring upgrade: what to monitor, how to choose settings, prevent false positives, and build reliable alerting.
- [Uptime Server Monitoring: A Practitioner’s Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/uptime-server-monitoring): Learn how uptime server monitoring works, what to track, how to reduce false alerts, and how to choose a setup that catches real outages.
- [User Authentication Failures - Troubleshooting Guide](https://zuzia.app/learn/user-authentication-failures): User authentication failures preventing access? Quick steps to identify authentication issues, fix account problems, and restore user access.
- [Virtual Machine Performance Degradation Emergency Troubleshooting](https://zuzia.app/learn/virtual-machine-performance-degradation): VM performance degraded right now? Quick steps to identify resource bottlenecks, optimize VM configuration, and restore performance within minutes.
- [Mastering Voice Call Alerts for Uptime Monitoring](https://zuzia.app/learn/voice-call-alerts): Master voice call alerts in uptime monitoring. Explore definitions, setup, advanced configurations, and practical scenarios for sysadmins and DevOps teams to cut MTTR for downtime incidents.
- [VPN Connection Disconnections Emergency Troubleshooting](https://zuzia.app/learn/vpn-connection-disconnections): VPN disconnected right now? Quick steps to restore connectivity, identify disconnection cause, and prevent future outages within minutes.
- [VPN Server Monitoring: A Practitioner's Guide to Catching Failures Early](https://zuzia.app/learn/vpn-server-monitoring): Learn how vpn server monitoring works, what to measure, how to reduce false alarms, and how to choose settings that catch outages early.
- [Vulnerability Exposure Security Risk Emergency Response](https://zuzia.app/learn/vulnerability-exposure-security-risk): Security vulnerability exposed right now? Quick steps to assess risk, contain exposure, patch vulnerabilities, and prevent exploitation within minutes.
- [Weak SSH Configuration Security Risk](https://zuzia.app/learn/weak-ssh-configuration-security-risk): Fix weak SSH configuration security risks on Linux servers. Detect weak configurations, prevent brute-force attacks, harden SSH access.
- [Webhook Notifications Integration](https://zuzia.app/learn/webhook-notifications): Configure webhook notifications in Zuzia.app to integrate with Slack, Discord, and custom applications. Setup webhook URLs, customize payloads, and automate responses.
- [Master Website Response Time Monitoring for Production Sites](https://zuzia.app/learn/website-response-time-monitoring): Deep dive into website response time monitoring: key metrics, tools, configurations, and best practices for sysadmins and DevOps. Learn to track TTFB, detect slowdowns, reduce false alerts, and optimize performance across locations.
- [Website Unavailable - How to Detect and Fix](https://zuzia.app/learn/website-unavailable-down): Fix website unavailability and downtime issues. Detect "Site can't be reached" errors, identify root causes, restore website access.
- [Zuzia.app Agent Integration](https://zuzia.app/learn/zuzia-app-agent): Install and configure Zuzia.app agent on Linux servers for comprehensive monitoring. Setup installation, configure settings, verify connectivity, and enable monitoring.
